name: Large Enterprise Regulated Industries (DACH)
description: Large enterprises in regulated industries (financial services, healthcare, energy, public sector) with 1,000-50,000 employees and EUR 500M-50B revenue in DACH.

segmentation.vertical: Regulated Industries (Financial Services, Healthcare, Energy, Public Sector)

tam.description: European cloud services in regulated industries
tam.source: IDC European Cloud Services Tracker 2025 — regulated industry verticals (BFSI, healthcare, energy, gov) account for approx. EUR 42B of total European enterprise cloud spend

sam.source: DACH represents ~20% of European enterprise IT spend; regulated verticals in DACH estimated at EUR 8.5B for managed cloud, migration, and sovereign infrastructure services

som.description: 60 customers x EUR 3M ACV in 3 years
som.source: Bottom-up: ~300 qualifying enterprises in DACH regulated industries; 20% reachable via existing Deutsche Telekom relationships = 60 target accounts; blended ACV EUR 3M (mix of migration projects EUR 1-2M + managed services EUR 1-3M/yr) = EUR 180M
